questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If in a certain code language 'RAMESH' is written as 'HSEMAR', then how will 'CREATE' be written in that language?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: If in a coded language 'BRINJAL' is written as 'LAJNIRB', then how will 'LADYFINGER' be written in that code?

solutions.solution: As, RAMESH → HSEMAR (1 2 3 4 5 6 → 6 5 4 3 2 1). Similarly, CREATE → ETAERC (1 2 3 4 5 6 → 6 5 4 3 2 1). ∴ CREATE = ETAERC
As, BRINJAL → LAJNIRB (8 R I N J A L → L A J N I R B with numbered positions 1 1 1 1 1 1 1). Similarly, LADYFINGER → REGNIFYDAL with corresponding pattern shown in diagram. ∴ LADYFINGER ⇒ REGNIFYDAL
